anxiety: Try taking a slow breath… you're safe right now.
It might help to pause and focus on what's around you.
This feeling will pass, even if it feels strong right now.
stress: Maybe take a short break and give your mind a moment.
You don’t have to figure everything out at once.
Try focusing on just one small step for now.
sadness: You don’t have to go through this alone.
It’s okay to feel like this sometimes.
anger: It’s okay to feel upset… just take a moment to breathe.
Stepping away for a bit might help clear your head.
Try not to rush your reaction.
joy: I’m glad something good is happening for you.
